title: No profile selector in new chat view
description: There is no way to select an agent profile when creating a new chat. The chat input area has a project selector and model selector but no profile selector. Users must manage profiles separately in Agent Profiles section but cannot apply them to conversations.
steps_to_reproduce:
1. Click 'New Chat' in sidebar
2. Look for a profile selector near the chat input area
3. No profile selector exists
expected: A profile selector dropdown or button should be available when creating new chats to select which agent profile to use
actual: No profile selector is present in the chat creation flow
